title: Demonic Magic halves equipped creature current HP on equip

card.rawText: Hit: +5. Atk: +5. Negate all creature effects on the field. Reduce equipped creature’s remaining HP by 1/2.

plan.title: Demonic Magic halves equipped creature current HP on equip
plan.summary: Equip Demonic Magic to a damaged creature and verify current remaining HP is reduced by half, rounded up, once on equip.

notes: Set player_1 primary creature to a legal target with 51 current HP before equip.
Demonic Magic is Infinite Equip and should remain in a magic slot after resolving.

steps: Player 1 plays Demonic Magic and equips it to their primary creature.
Inspect equipped creature current HP and magic slot state.
manualVerification: Confirm reduction used current HP, not max HP.
Confirm effect does not repeat on later phase changes without re-equip.
riskNotes: Runtime support reports no route for DEAL_PERCENTAGE_DAMAGE; test may expose missing resolver.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate unsupported percentage HP damage path manually before marking blocker.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
